view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for fixed-duration appointments is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for fixed-duration appointments is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Fixed-duration appointments (e.g., 50 minutes)'. The evidence shows that the booking process allows customers to select 50-minute slots, as indicated in the linked use case summary where clients see available 50-minute slots. Additionally, the successful booking evidence from the 'customer-book-primary' step confirms that appointments are indeed fixed at this duration, thus satisfying the requirement.
